emails.subject: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Dan, Attached are the details for the enovate transaction(s)/purchases of physical gas from Reliant Trunkline Stx pool. I received your draft of the agreed Master for the 30,000/ day parcel. Could you draft a form for the 5,000/day parcel winter only. I need this turned around so I can forward to the Reliant people ASAP. I also need to forward any changes to the agreement past our partners PEC legals folks. Thanks, If you have any questions please call me at (312) 541-1226

emails.subject: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Dan, Attached are the details for the enovate transaction(s)/purchases of physical gas from Reliant Trunkline Stx pool. I received your draft of the agreed Master for the 30,000/ day parcel. Could you draft a form for the 5,000/day parcel winter only. I need this turned around so I can forward to the Reliant people ASAP. I also need to forward any changes to the agreement past our partners PEC legals folks. Thanks, If you have any questions please call me at (312) 541-1226

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Paul, You say 5,000/day plus fuel. The delivery point is in the south texas pool. Where does the fuel come in and how is it determined? Also, did we ever determine the name of the Reliant Energy entity that was doing the deal? Paul Burgener@ENRON 09/25/2000 04:45 PM

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Paul, You say 5,000/day plus fuel. The delivery point is in the south texas pool. Where does the fuel come in and how is it determined? Also, did we ever determine the name of the Reliant Energy entity that was doing the deal? Paul Burgener@ENRON 09/25/2000 04:45 PM

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Dan, The company is Reliant Energy (wholesale trading group) at this point and the fuel is handled the same as the 30,000/d deal that you wrote up. (See attached) thanks,

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Dan, The company is Reliant Energy (wholesale trading group) at this point and the fuel is handled the same as the 30,000/d deal that you wrote up. (See attached) thanks,

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Paul, Please check with your counterparty at Reliant for the full name of the Reliant Energy entity. Is it Reliant Energy Gas Resources Corp. or some other name? I am still confused about the fuel component of the volume. We probably need to expand on the language in the prior draft to specify the fuel volume for the movement of the gas from the Delivery Point to ___________________. Have the attached documents been sent to Reliant Energy and if so have we received any comments from them? I will draft a Transaction Agreement for the latest deal that will be similar to the prior deal. Paul Burgener@ENRON 09/26/2000 10:06 AM

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant

emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Attached is a draft Transaction Agreement for the 5,000/day Winter deal. Please Review.

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Dan, The legal name is Reliant Energy Services, Inc. I have forwarded the two transactions to Reliant, and as of yet I have not gotten any comments back. I will forward those to you as soon as I receive them. Thanks for all help.

emails.subject: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant
emails.body: Re: Trunkline Deals w/Reliant Dan, The legal name is Reliant Energy Services, Inc. I have forwarded the two transactions to Reliant, and as of yet I have not gotten any comments back. I will forward those to you as soon as I receive them. Thanks for all help.
